name: Q-11 PR with missing manifest deducts the full manifest_completeness (0/30) component score
command: : > drift.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc --manifest absent.json --adrs-csv 'ADR-1,ADR-2,ADR-3,ADR-4,ADR-5' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 3 --format json > out.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.components.manifest_completeness===0?0:1)' && echo deducted 1>&2
